title: Medical Assistant
description:
The Broad Institute advances biomedical research through genomic science. Our research has pioneered breakthroughs in cancer, infectious disease, and stem cell biology.

We're seeking a Medical Assistant to join our Research team in Boulder. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Assist physicians and clinical staff with patient examinations and medical procedures
Maintain accurate and confidential patient medical records and documentation
Perform routine vital signs monitoring and basic patient care tasks
Prepare examination rooms and sterilize medical instruments per protocol
Support clinical research activities and coordinate patient communications
Ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations and infection control standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; medical assistant certification preferred
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of clinical or healthcare support experience
